description: Source-aligned Unicode v2 Lean 4 benchmark for the Dafny dafny-lang/libraries Unicode module: core Unicode vocabulary, abstract encoding-form operations, UTF-8 and UTF-16 encoding forms, UTF-8 encoding-scheme serialization, and Unicode string conversion utilities.

notes: Restores the broad 8-module Unicode scope selected by curation after the prior unicode-v2 pilot was narrowed to Utf8EncodingScheme only.
Dafny refinement/subset types that erase to Lean list aliases are represented with explicit preconditions in the affected specs rather than by assuming the Lean aliases carry proofs.
The public API namespace remains Unicode while the benchmark root package and RepoImpl field are UnicodeV2/unicodeV2.

Spec/impl binding audit promoted Unicode behavior helpers that constrain scored APIs into the scored spec surface; namespace-colliding UTF-8/UTF-16 helpers are scored through unique top-level wrappers.

apis.name: uefSplitPrefixMinimalWellFormedCodeUnitSubsequence
apis.representation_policy: Dafny subset/refinement returns are represented by transparent Lean data plus explicit well-formedness/minimality predicates in specs and guards.

specs.name: spec_splitPrefix_inverts_prepend
semantic_bridge_required: Lean list aliases do not carry Dafny subset-type witnesses; minimality is an explicit antecedent.

specs.name: spec_partition_minimal_is_singleton
semantic_bridge_required: Lean list aliases do not carry Dafny subset-type witnesses; minimality is an explicit antecedent.

semantic_bridge_required: Lean list aliases do not carry Dafny subset-type witnesses; minimality is an explicit antecedent.

specs.name: spec_flatten_minimal_is_wellformed
semantic_bridge_required: Lean list aliases do not carry Dafny subset-type witnesses; minimality is an explicit antecedent.

apis.name: absASCIIToUTF8
apis.source_precondition: forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: 0 <= s[i] as int < 128

apis.name: absASCIIToUTF16
apis.source_precondition: forall i | 0 <= i < |s| :: 0 <= s[i] as int < 128

semantic_mappings.name: Dafny refinement/subset type erasure policy
semantic_mappings.reason: Lean aliases such as MinimalWellFormedCodeUnitSeq and WellFormedCodeUnitSeq are transparent lists; source predicates are preserved as explicit spec antecedents and guards instead of being silently assumed by type.

semantic_mappings.name: Abstract ASCII helper functions
semantic_mappings.reason: ASCIIToUTF8 and ASCIIToUTF16 are now scored APIs and are guarded/spec-helper constrained under the Dafny ASCII precondition.
